dbi_complaints.item: provide a minimum one carbon monixide alarm/detector per dwelling unit/apartment(907.2.11 (sfbc)
dbi_complaints.nov_item_description: provide a affidavit-self certification for the smoke detector & carbon monoxide alarms test smoke detectors on a regular basis and replace batteries annually to maintain a working and functional device. advise occupants not to disconnect the batteries or remove the units inside the apartments or from public areas.

dbi_complaints.item: maintain fire escape drop ladder (801, 1001-b,m sfhc)
dbi_complaints.nov_item_description: on reinspection day, owner or owner's representative must demonstrate the workability of all fire escape drop ladders or provide a certificate from a fire escape maintenance company indicating that the drop ladders are in good working condition.
